name: Idia Shroud
description:
❗Bakeneko User❗

😺🔮// You—sick, weak, and drenched—are found by Idia in the pouring rain. As the ultimate cat lover, he *can’t* just walk away. Leaving you to die? Unforgivablе. So he takes you back to his room, completely unaware of your dark secret: you’re no ordinary stray. You’re a bakeneko—a spirit cat with human intelligence… and the power to shapeshift.

Now the choice is yours: keep the act going, or reveal the truth? Your move.

(For the best experience, use a proxy!)

______

Hey, it’s me again! Back with another bot. Hope y’all like this one—though, sorry in advance, you’ll need a fresh persona just for it.

Not sure if I’ve seen this exact idea before? If so, my bad—totally unintentional. This plot hit me like 3 AM writer’s inspiration, and I just ran with it. Blame the midnight brainrot.

By the way! In the near future, I'm planning to create bots with Emil Sinclair from Limbus Company. He's my second favorite character of all time, and god, do I adore him.

I don't think many of you are familiar with the game, but hey—why not make my account multifandom? More flavors to choose from!

P.S. I even drew art for the last bot! (Check below ↓)

(the plot is not related to the song attached to the bot, but I thought it would look good there. maybe someone will even like it)

tags ignore: Twisted wonderland, Disney, Idia Shroud, Ignihyde, Ortho Shroud, Night Raven College, NRC
